title: New Emails and Activities - Google Calendar / Outlook Calendar Integration
excerpt:

posts.author: shayan.moussawi (Shayan Moussawi)
posts.cookedHtml:
There is a post in the Whats New section and also in yesterdays Investors Call slides, mentioning that Google Calendar and Outlook Calendar Integrations have been released for Emails and Activities.

However I can find next to no documentation on how to set this up.

Also I would like to understand how exactly a Calendar sync would work using multiple calendars. Would each sales rep have to sync their calendar individually?

posts.author: MarkK11 (Mark Kaspar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Shayan Moussawi:

Also I would like to understand how exactly a Calendar sync would work using multiple calendars. Would each sales rep have to sync their calendar individually?

To set up Google Calendar and Outlook Calendar integrations, you can import your Google Calendar into Outlook or vice versa by using the URLs provided in the calendar settings. For syncing multiple calendars, each sales rep would typically need to sync their individual calendars. Tools like OneCal allow syncing multiple calendars in one go, which could be useful for your team.

posts.author: shayan.moussawi (Shayan Moussawi)
posts.cookedHtml: But I am talking about the new released Emails and Activities Calendar integration
